calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Candance Yount, #2737.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared with plaintiff N.R. Patel, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Harry Joyner.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff N.R. Patel, and against defendant Harry Joyner, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,500.00.
Holdover Damages - $325.00.
Costs - $240.00.

Total - $2,065.00.

Additionally, plaintiff N.R. Patel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street, #216, San Francisco, CA 94103. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
